scripts.build:base: pnpm prepare:base && pnpm codegen && graph build
scripts.build:celo: pnpm prepare:celo && pnpm codegen && graph build
scripts.build:optimism: pnpm prepare:optimism && pnpm codegen && graph build
scripts.build:arbitrum-one: pnpm prepare:arbitrum-one && pnpm codegen && graph build
scripts.build:optimism-sepolia: pnpm prepare:optimism-sepolia && pnpm codegen && graph build
scripts.deploy:base: source .env && graph deploy flow-splitter-base --version-label v0.0.3 --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --deploy-key $STUDIO_DEPLOY_KEY
scripts.deploy:celo: source .env && graph deploy flow-splitter-celo --version-label v0.0.3 --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --deploy-key $STUDIO_DEPLOY_KEY
scripts.deploy:optimism: source .env && graph deploy flow-splitter-optimism --version-label v0.0.3 --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --deploy-key $STUDIO_DEPLOY_KEY
scripts.deploy:arbitrum-one: source .env && graph deploy flow-splitter-arbitrum-one --version-label v0.0.3 --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --ipfs https://ipfs.network.thegraph.com --deploy-key $STUDIO_DEPLOY_KEY
